Container.Name: ez1-monitor
Container.Overview: Local-only monitoring dashboard for the APsystems EZ1-M microinverter. Polls the inverter's local API every minute (configurable), stores all measurements in SQLite, and serves a web dashboard with live power, daily/weekly/monthly history, period comparisons and lifetime statistics (energy, CO2 avoided, money saved). No cloud, no account, no telemetry. UI auto-detects German or English from browser language. [br][br] [b]Prerequisites:[/b][br] 1. EZ1-M reachable on your network with a known IP (use DHCP reservation).[br] 2. Local API enabled on the inverter (AP EasyPower app -> inverter settings -> Local Mode -> Continuous).[br] 3. Test API responds: [i]curl http://<ez1-ip>:8050/getDeviceInfo[/i]

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: HTTP port the dashboard is served on.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database.

Config.Name: Inverter IP
Config.Description: REQUIRED. IP address of your EZ1-M inverter. Use a DHCP reservation so it never changes. The container refuses to start if this is empty.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: IANA timezone identifier. Determines day boundaries for daily/weekly/monthly aggregations and timestamps in logs. Examples: Europe/Berlin, America/New_York, Asia/Tokyo, UTC

Config.Name: UI language
Config.Description: Force the UI language. Leave empty to auto-detect from the browser. Valid values: empty, de, en

Config.Name: Currency
Config.Description: Currency code for the 'money saved' card. Valid values: EUR, USD

Config.Name: Electricity price per kWh
Config.Description: Your local electricity price per kWh (in the configured currency). Used for the 'money saved' calculation.

Config.Name: Data retention (days)
Config.Description: Keep raw measurements for N days. Default 730 (2 years) allows year-over-year comparisons. Older data is pruned daily. Set to 0 to disable automatic pruning.

Config.Name: Inverter Port
Config.Description: Port of the inverter's local API. Default is 8050.

Config.Name: Poll interval (seconds)
Config.Description: How often the inverter is polled. Default 60s. Lower values create more data; higher values are gentler on the inverter. Automatically slowed down 10x (capped at 5 min) when the inverter is offline.

Config.Name: Installed peak power (kWp)
Config.Description: Installed module peak power in kWp. Used for optional comparisons.

Config.Name: Grid CO2 intensity (kg/kWh)
Config.Description: Grid CO2 intensity in kg CO2 per kWh. Default 0.38 reflects the recent German grid mix. Use a lower value for greener grids, higher for fossil-heavy grids.

Config.Name: Log level
Config.Description: Python log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR
